name: Finance Trading AI Agents MCP
what_it_does: Finance Trading AI Agents MCP server enabling AI agents to access financial market data and trading tools — fetching stock prices and market data, analyzing financial instruments, and integrating market data into agent-driven investment research and trading analysis workflows.
use_cases: Fetching real-time and historical stock market data from investment research agents
Analyzing financial market conditions from trading analysis agents
Building trading signal generation tools from quantitative finance agents
Monitoring portfolio performance from risk management agents
Researching financial instruments from investment analysis agents
Integrating market data into AI-driven finance workflows
not_for: Live order execution without explicit risk controls
Teams without understanding of financial data sources and limitations
best_when: A quantitative researcher or algorithmic trader needs AI-assisted market data access for investment research and trading strategy development.
avoid_when: You need a specific brokerage integration (use dedicated brokerage MCPs like ib-mcp or kite-mcp-server) or live execution trading.

auth.notes: Financial data API keys required (provider-dependent). Check repository for currently supported data sources and required credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Depends on connected data providers — many have free tiers
pricing.paid_tiers: Premium market data APIs (Bloomberg, Refinitiv) have significant costs
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Market data costs depend on provider. Free APIs (Yahoo Finance, Alpha Vantage) have limitations.

performance.rate_limits: Data provider dependent — free tiers typically 5-500 requests/minute

known_agent_gotchas: Community MCP from individual — limited documentation and maintenance
Data source APIs and required credentials may change without notice
Free market data APIs have significant limitations (delayed data, low rate limits)
Financial data quality varies significantly between free and paid sources
Trading signals generated are NOT financial advice — use with appropriate risk management
Market data alone insufficient for trading — requires risk management layer
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced for data APIs. API keys required — store as environment variables. Community MCP. Financial data — handle with appropriate compliance awareness. Not for live trading without proper risk controls.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Community MCP. Financial compliance awareness required.
